channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: What is space-time? A mystery at the heart of reality
item.description: What if our biggest idea about reality is built on a hidden misunderstanding? A new philosophical look at space-time challenges the popular view that ...

item.title: Scientists may have debunked one of humanity's oldest habits
item.description: Ancient grooves on human teeth, once considered evidence of tooth-picking, may simply result from natural wear, according to a new study of wild p...

item.title: Helmets long believed to be Roman are actually medieval, scientists reveal
item.description: A decades-old mystery is solved: 43 helmets found off Spain's coast are medieval, not Roman.

item.title: Brain chemical that helps break bad habits identified by scientists
item.description: A key brain signal that helps break old habits and adapt to change has been discovered in mice.
